prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 18349→28241→24398→17598→26228，波动较大；2025 年基准约 26228 名，较 2024 年明显后移约 8630 名，反映当年报考热度显著上升；该校在甘肃物理类（含理科）计划数：2021 年 141 人、2022 年 204 人、2023 年 197 人、2024 年 156 人、2025 年 170 人；2026 年计划 174 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 2.4%，扩招对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021 年约第 144 名→2026 年约第 87 名，近年排名显著跃升，反映学校综合实力和声誉稳步增强；2023 年曾出现教师不配合核酸检测等偏负面事件，2024 年声誉转为中性/混合（分数线争议），2025–2026 年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 32 位（较热），综合热度约 136 万，短视频曝光度较高，对报考关注有正向拉动。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与海南大学优势工科方向契合，吸引 高分考生；甘肃省 2026 年物理类考生约 14.8 万人（按历史比例估算），较 2025 年约 12.1 万人增长约 21.5%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移、2026 年物理类考生规模显著扩大（+21.5%）、学校排名持续上升及抖音热度较高等因素，预计 2026 年报考热度继续升温，竞争进一步加剧；在 2025 年基准 26228 名基础上，结合 ，预测最低位次约 26798 名，区间 26298–27298 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 18349 → 28241 → 24398 → 17598 → 26228, showing significant fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 26228, a notable backward shift of about 8630 places compared to 2024, reflecting a marked increase in application popularity that year; the university's enrollment plan in Gansu for Physics Category (including Science) was: 141 in 2021, 204 in 2022, 197 in 2023, 156 in 2024, 170 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 174, a slight expansion of about 2.4% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising continuously: from about 144th in 2021 to about 87th in 2026, a significant leap in recent years, reflecting steadily enhanced comprehensive strength and reputation; in 2023, there were negative incidents such as teachers not cooperating with nucleic acid testing, and in 2024, the reputation turned neutral/mixed (score line controversy); from 2025 to 2026, no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat ranking is 32nd overall (relatively hot), with comprehensive heat of about 1.36 million, high short video exposure, positively driving application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with Hainan University's advantageous engineering directions, attracting high-scoring students; the number of Physics Category examinees in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 148,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), an increase of about 21.5% compared to about 121,000 in 2025, with a significant increase in the examinee pool, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the notable expansion of Physics Category examinees in 2026 (+21.5%), the continuous rise in university rankings, and high Douyin heat, it is expected that application popularity will continue to heat up in 2026, with further intensified competition; based on the 2025 baseline of 26228, combined with these factors, the predicted lowest ranking is about 26798, with a range of 26298–27298.
